outline.headline: AI Presentation Systems Overview
outline.message: Introduction to AI systems for generating PPTX decks

outline.headline: Data Ingestion in AI Systems
outline.message: AI systems ingest data through structured data connectors, document uploads, and cloud file links.
evidence_queries: How do AI systems ingest data?
What are the methods for data ingestion in AI presentation systems?

outline.headline: Hybrid Architecture of AI Systems
outline.message: AI systems use a hybrid architecture involving data normalization, retrieval, and content planning.
evidence_queries: What is the architecture of AI presentation systems?
How do AI systems plan and outline content?

outline.headline: Design Quality Strategies
outline.message: Comparison of template-first, rule-based, and free-form layout strategies in AI systems.
evidence_queries: What are the design quality strategies in AI systems?
How do different layout strategies compare?

outline.headline: Template-Driven Layout Benefits
outline.message: Template-driven layouts reduce failures and maintain brand consistency.
evidence_queries: What are the benefits of template-driven layouts?
How do template-driven layouts maintain brand consistency?

outline.headline: Rule-Based Auto-Layout Features
outline.message: Rule-based layouts use curated slide types and auto-resize features for polish.
evidence_queries: What features do rule-based auto-layouts offer?
How do rule-based layouts enhance visual polish?

outline.headline: Free-Form Layout Constraints
outline.message: Free-form layouts propose structures with geometric and readability constraints.
evidence_queries: What constraints are applied in free-form layouts?
How do free-form layouts ensure readability?

outline.headline: Summary and Recommendations
outline.message: Summarize key points and recommend best practices for AI presentation systems.
